title: Dead Body
description: The Most Advanced Realistic Lootable GUI Corpses Graves and Dead Bodies for Mobs and Players in Minecraft! + PVP Logging Solutions & More
body: ![Dead Body Banner](https://i.imgur.com/P9lLRra.png) # Dead Body ## Supports **Minecraft 1.21+** **Version 26.1.2** **Real bodies. Real loot. Real consequences.** Built to work with [Death+](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/death-smart-spectating-killcam-effects.133321/) for advanced spectating and death messages. Dead Body transforms Minecraft death into a persistent, physical gameplay event. Instead of items scattering across the ground, players and mobs leave behind fully lootable corpses with poses, models, nameplates, animations, and in-game configuration tools. Designed for modern Paper / Spigot 1.21+ servers with performance, reliability, and immersion in mind. ## Wiki FULL GUIDE & WIKI ![Divider](https://i.imgur.com/6TIslyE.png) ## Features - **Lootable Corpses** — Items are captured at death and stored inside a corpse container. - **Multiple Render Modes** — ArmorStand, ItemDisplay, PlayerModel, and Mob model rendering. - **In-Game GUI Editor** — Configure behavior, visuals, permissions, and rules in-game. - **Pose Studio** — Create and preview custom corpse poses directly in the world. - **Death Cause Mapping** — Apply different poses depending on how an entity died. - **Animated Despawn** — Corpses can sink, spin, scale down, dissolve, jitter, or vanish. - **Mob Corpses** — Vanilla mobs can leave behind bodies. - **MythicMobs Support** — Whitelist or blacklist custom mobs. - **Combat Logging** — Optional logout-death handling for combat disconnects. - **Reliable Cleanup** — Safeguards prevent orphaned entities, displays, and containers. - **Smart Placement** — Corpses adjust to slabs, carpets, stairs, uneven terrain, and builds. ![Capabilities](https://i.imgur.com/BpdXu7a.png) ## Showcase ### ArmorStand ![ArmorStand Corpse](https://s13.gifyu.com/images/bvC8u.gif) **A fallen player leaves behind a physical body that stores their inventory and can be looted by others.** ### Player Models ![Player Entity Custom Death Poses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa70c7252c7e04f16b7e7be705a1a7716a49f47c_0.webp) ![Player Model GIF](https://s13.gifyu.com/images/bvC84.gif) **Full player models rendered on the ground with armor, held items, and custom poses applied.** ### Display Models ![Display Entity Models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/079ab081c2c7582a2cb5761d39d4d237112635b8_0.webp) **Use resource-pack models to render custom corpse visuals with modern Display entities.** ### Mob Corpses ![Mob Dead Bodies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2652eadb6022d32d65a2e492aec93e7f9b2a88f4_0.webp) **Vanilla mobs, including zombies, villagers, animals, and bosses, can leave behind corpses.** ### MythicMobs ![MythicMobs Integration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35180a12a216834405047aa54d6894109b0d17b9_0.webp) **Whitelist or blacklist specific Mythic mobs to avoid conflicts with other death systems.** ### GUI Editor ![GUI Editor](https://s13.gifyu.com/images/bvC8R.gif) A comprehensive GUI lets administrators configure nearly every part of the plugin in-game. ### Pose Studio ![Pose Studio](https://s13.gifyu.com/images/bvVu1.gif) Adjust translation, rotation, and scale for custom corpse models with real-time preview tools. ### Despawn ![Animated Despawn](https://s13.gifyu.com/images/bvC8l.gif) Corpses can disappear with cinematic animations like sinking, spinning, shrinking, or dissolving. ### Nameplates ![Countdown Nameplates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36bc2765904e6e066ef644c35429d22b4421bf6a.png) Optional nameplates can show corpse ownership and a live despawn countdown. ### Death Poses ![Player Body](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa70c7252c7e04f16b7e7be705a1a7716a49f47c_0.webp) Configure different corpse poses depending on the cause of death. ![Config](https://i.imgur.com/yyPHEc1.png) ## Config Dead Body gives server owners deep configuration control: - Select corpse render type: ArmorStand, ItemDisplay, or PlayerModel - Automatically scale corpses based on entity size - Define loot access permissions - Configure timed despawn or despawn-on-empty behavior - Customize nameplate style - Adjust corpse interaction hitboxes - Assign custom poses per death cause - Map Mythic mobs to special behaviors - Use GUI configuration or YAML editing ![Performance](https://i.imgur.com/bE1DWtO.png) ## Performance Designed for modern Paper servers with performance and stability in mind: - Smart entity tracking and lifecycle management - Clean despawn and entity cleanup systems - Optional persistence across server restarts - No unsafe NMS dependencies - Graceful fallback when optional dependencies are missing ![Dependencies](https://i.imgur.com/XuKHHLA.png) ## Requirements **Required** - Paper / Spigot 1.21+ **Recommended** - **LibsDisguises** — Enables full player and mob model corpse rendering. Needed for player model corpses. **Optional** - **DeathPlus** — Advanced death spectating, killcams, and death messages. - **MythicMobs** — Custom mob corpse filtering and integration. - **ProtocolLib** — Extra compatibility for advanced rendering paths. ![Use Cases](https://i.imgur.com/fgh4vm2.png) ## Use Cases Dead Body works especially well on servers focused on immersion and persistence: - Hardcore survival servers - PvP factions and raiding servers - MMORPG-style progression servers - Roleplay worlds - Immersive SMP servers - Custom servers using MythicMobs or custom mobs ## Example Server **MCWAR.CO** ![MCWAR](https://i.imgur.com/nJmLZG5.png) ## Links [Full Plugin Guide](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/dead-body-%E2%80%94-realistic-lootable-corpses-player-mob-bodies.132902/field?field=documentation) [24/7 Support Chat](https://discord.gg/eXU4YP94u3) ## Support If something appears broken or confusing, please open a support ticket on Discord and we will help as quickly as possible. Please include: - Server version: Paper / Spigot + build number - Plugin version - Detailed issue description - Screenshots, if applicable - Steps to reproduce - Console logs or error messages, preferably through Pastebin
